$comment: SINGLE SOURCE for the Vacation Care PES (mobile booking) handoff. Edit this only; scripts/build-handoff.mjs generates HANDOFF.md, handoff.html, handover/*.json into this folder. Bump version + add a changelog row on every change.
title: Vacation Care — PES (mobile booking)
summary: Parent-facing mobile flow to book Vacation Care sessions for a child. Dark iOS-style app reproduced from the Vacation Care Figma 'Mobile Booking Workflow'. Bookings landing (month calendar + holiday-program banner) → New Vacation Care Booking → pick child → multi-select sessions (by date, some waitlist-only) → Review Booking (line items + promo + price breakdown) → booking detail (cosmic hero). 'Done' = a parent can assemble and confirm a multi-session vacation-care booking and view its detail. Counterpart to the Office desktop flow.
outOfScope: Real availability / pricing / promo validation and payment
Recurring (weekly) booking builder beyond the Casual/Recurring toggle
The Care / Sign In / Finance / Account tabs (Bookings tab only)

components.name: pes-tab-bar
components.notes: bottom tab nav: Care / Bookings / Sign In / Finance / Account

components.name: pes-month-calendar
components.notes: Sun-start month grid; today filled orange; orange dots mark days with bookings

components.name: pes-field
components.notes: tappable select field; Session(s) shows count + clear-X

components.name: pes-session-row
components.notes: checkbox multi-select row grouped by date; waitlist-only purple pill

components.name: pes-line-item
components.notes: review line item: date + activity + room + fee, removable

components.name: pes-cosmic-hero
components.notes: starfield + teal-planet hero on the booking detail

motion.notes: Each screen rises/fades in ~320ms; reduced-motion removes it.

screens.name: Bookings
screens.purpose: Landing: see the month's bookings and start a new one.
screens.exit: New → S2; tap a booking card → S6
layout: Teal banner: 'July Holiday Program Now Open' (dismissible)
Month calendar (July 2026, Sun-start): today filled orange, orange dots on days with bookings
Bottom: a booking card (Vacation Care Booking • Joey · Little Bugs ELC · times)
Bottom tab bar: Care / Bookings / Sign In / Finance / Account
behaviour: ‘＋ New’ opens the New Vacation Care Booking form (S2).
Tapping the booking card opens its detail (S6).
Tab bar shows the Bookings tab active (other tabs out of scope).
a11y: New, banner dismiss, and the booking card are buttons; tab items have labels.

acceptance.text: Today is the only filled calendar day; dots mark bookings.
acceptance.assert: filledDay==16 AND dots on JULY_DOTS days

screens.name: New Vacation Care Booking
screens.purpose: Assemble a booking: child, booking type, sessions.
screens.exit: Fields open S3/S4; Review → S5 when child + ≥1 session
layout: Large header 'New Vacation Care Booking' + close (X)
Child's name → Select child (shows name + service, e.g. Little Seeds OSHC)
Session(s) → shows 'N sessions selected' with a clear-X once chosen

redlines.spec: 56px, radius 14, border grey-1000; Session(s) trailing clear-X when set

behaviour: The Session(s) clear-X empties the selection.
Review enabled only with a child and ≥1 session.
a11y: Fields + CTA are operable controls with names; clear-X has an accessible label.

acceptance.text: Session(s) field shows the count and can be cleared.

screens.name: Select Child
screens.purpose: Choose the child the booking is for.
behaviour: Tapping a child sets it and returns to S2.
a11y: Rows are buttons named by the child.

acceptance.text: Selecting a child returns to S2 with it set.

screens.name: Select Session
layout: Checkbox row: activity + '$fee · location' + time; waitlist-only sessions show a purple pill

redlines.spec: 22px, radius 5; checked = orange-500 fill + white tick

behaviour: Tapping a row toggles its checkbox; the footer count updates.
Save (enabled with ≥1) writes the selection back to S2; the field shows the count.
Opening the picker pre-checks the already-selected sessions.
a11y: Rows are checkboxes (role/checked); waitlist status is text + colour.

screens.name: Review Booking
screens.purpose: Review line items, apply promo, see totals.
layout: Per-session line items: date + activity + room + fee, each removable (X); waitlist items show the pill and no fee
Teal alert (pricing applies to confirmed dates)
Price breakdown: Available • N sessions / Promo • 10% / TOTAL NOW

redlines.spec: date header w/ calendar icon + remove-X; fee right-aligned; waitlist = purple pill, no fee

behaviour: Removing a line item drops it from the booking and recomputes totals.
Only non-waitlist (available) sessions count toward the subtotal.
Promo applies a 10% discount to the available subtotal; TOTAL NOW = subtotal − discount.
Confirm advances to the booking detail (S6).
a11y: Remove and Confirm are buttons; alert + promo text contrast ≥ 4.5:1 on dark.

acceptance.text: Removing an item recomputes the total.
acceptance.assert: remove(item) -> total reflects remaining available fees

screens.name: Booking detail
screens.entry: From S5 Confirm, or a booking card on S1
layout: CHILD / CENTRE / ACTIVITY / FEE / PHONE / COMMENT rows

redlines.spec: 150px; dark radial gradient + 78px teal-gradient planet + star dots

behaviour: Cancel Booking resets the flow back to S1 (Bookings).
a11y: Detail rows are label/value pairs; Cancel Booking is a button.

acceptance.assert: tap(Cancel Booking) -> route==S1 AND state reset

openQuestions.q: Recurring booking: full weekly-pattern builder is out of scope here — confirm its own flow.
Source of session availability / waitlist / pricing and promo validation (API).
Booking detail covers request/confirmed; confirm the withdraw/cancel variants (teal 'Withdraw Request' card) are a separate state.

decisions.decision: Built dark on Stardust primitives (grey-1200/1100/1000, orange-500/600, purple-550, cyan-500) — the tokens the Figma uses.
decisions.rationale: Exact-style reproduction of the Vacation Care mobile app while staying on-token.

decisions.decision: Sessions are multi-selected by date; waitlist-only sessions are excluded from the priced subtotal; a 10% promo applies to available sessions.
decisions.rationale: Matches the Figma Select Session + Review Booking screens.

changelog.change: Initial PES handoff (generic Simplify Bookings flow — superseded).
Rebuilt to the actual Vacation Care mobile screens: Bookings landing, New Vacation Care Booking, multi-select Select Session, Review Booking (line items + promo), booking detail (cosmic hero).
